summary: Backend refactoring testing completed. 23/23 backend tests PASS. Fixed 3 bugs during testing: (1) Route ordering in generation.py, (2) Frontend API endpoint mismatch, (3) Dashboard data field mismatch. All requested features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring from 5159-line monolith to modular routes is successful
All route files properly import from shared.py using sys.path fix
server.py is now 279 lines and cleanly imports all routers
Route ordering in generation.py was incorrect - fixed by moving GET / before GET /{id}
Frontend API utility was calling wrong endpoint /api/generate/generations instead of /api/generate/
Dashboard.js was expecting 'balance' field but API returns 'credits' - fixed
seed_data_creation: Demo and admin users are seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring is complete and working. All modular routes are properly integrated. Fixed route ordering issue in generation.py and frontend API endpoint mismatch. Dashboard now correctly displays user name, credits, and generation count.

health_endpoints./api/health/: PASS - Returns healthy status with version 2.0.0
health_endpoints./api/health/ready: PASS - Readiness probe with DB connection check

auth_endpoints.GET /api/auth/me: PASS - Returns user info with auth

payments_endpoints.GET /api/payments/products: PASS - Returns 5 products with Razorpay key

frontend.Homepage: PASS - Loads correctly with branding and CTAs
frontend.Login page: PASS - Form elements present, Google sign-in available
frontend.Dashboard: PASS - Shows user name, credits (100), generations (5)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Route ordering - GET /{generation_id} was before GET /, causing /api/generate/generations to match the wrong route
Expected creditsRes.data.balance but API returns creditsRes.data.credits
Expected generationsRes.data.content but API returns generationsRes.data.generations
